# Source: custom: minimal-custom adapter (code-defined routes)
# Command: node scripts/route-tree.mjs --router examples/router-adapter/minimal-custom/my-router.mjs

/
├─ index.tsx                         route: /
├─ about.tsx                         route: /about
└─ blog/
   └─ [slug].tsx                     route: /blog/[slug]
